_description: Dirty Page tracking for Android-SW-Owner Skill Set. A 'dirty' skill requires content refresh due to AOSP version changes or path structure updates.
_research_note: 2026-04-04 steward session: A16 changes identified — GKI 6.12 KMI, AVF/pKVM expansions, AIDL/HIDL gap, biannual AOSP drops. See HS-023..HS-026.

L2-hal-vendor-interface-expert._steward_note: AIDL mandatory for new HALs; Audio CAP gap blocks HIDL→AIDL migration for some OEMs. genfscon label optionality for vendor API 202504+. See HS-025.

L2-version-migration-expert._steward_note: AOSP drops now biannual (Q2/Q4 2026). android-latest-release replaces aosp-main. 16KB page mandatory for Play apps targeting A15+. See HS-026.

L2-multimedia-audio-expert._steward_note: Audio AIDL HAL: CAP not ported in A14/A15; blocks OEM migration. Audio policy config moved from XML to AIDL HAL. See HS-025.

L2-kernel-gki-expert._steward_note: A16 ships GKI android16-6.12 (Linux 6.12 LTS). New KMI baseline; 16KB page-size GKI builds available. See HS-023.

L2-bootloader-lk-expert._note: Paths (bootloader/lk/, atf/) are vendor/SoC-supplied, not in standard AOSP.

L2-trusted-firmware-atf-expert._note: Paths (atf/, trusty/) are vendor/SoC-supplied, not in standard AOSP.
L2-trusted-firmware-atf-expert._steward_note: A16 pKVM guest firmware uses FF-A for TrustZone communication in protected VMs. ATF skill must document FF-A path. See HS-024.

L2-virtualization-pkvm-expert._steward_note: A16: AVF LL-NDK vendor VMs, early-boot VMs, Microdroid 16K pVM, FF-A guest firmware. See HS-024.
